steps.title: Identify the key distinction between rovers and microprobes
steps.content: The student wants to “explain an advantage” of microprobes. The notes highlight a clear distinction: rovers cannot reach certain regions of Mars, while microprobes could be deployed virtually anywhere on the surface. This accessibility advantage is the single strongest signal.

steps.title: Find the choice that demonstrates this advantage
steps.content: B directly shows the advantage by combining microprobes' light weight (50 mg) with their ability to explore inaccessible areas—making clear why they're superior to rovers. The other three choices either fail to explain any advantage, contradict the notes, or blur the comparison. That matches choice B — B is correct.
